meaning: <德>n.教育小说(源于德国文学中一种传统的小说类型,以描述主人公成长过程为主题)
examples: First, this novel is a typical Bildungsroman by analyzing the structure and typical images in every scenes.
The plot is a similar to that of a picaresque novel or a bildungsroman, for it parodies many adventure and romance cliches.
Qin Wenjun also in the way the narrative seeks to distinguish the traditional Bildungsroman, showing the unique artistic features.
There is a laconic, world-weary protagonist in the person of Inky Lautner, whose negotiation of his urban underworld works as a sort of noir bildungsroman.
